## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Merge and fwd.digital for AI-powered marketing automation and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Merge is facing budget constraints and seeking to optimize marketing spend for quality enterprise pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered workflow automation and content creation services that align with Merge's needs](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Focus areas: AI workflows for sales/marketing automation, SEO content strategy leveraging Merge's 200+ integrations](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Potential to start with workflow automation, with content strategy as a possible addition later](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

## Topics

### Merge's Marketing Strategy Shift

  - [Considering major reallocation of budget away from paid digital](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Four key focus areas for next year:](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
    1.  Events (performing well)
    2.  Community building
    3.  SEO investment
    4.  Lifecycle/workflow automation (potential area for collaboration)
  - [Goal: Improve conversion, find pipeline opportunities, and enhance overall lifecycle management](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### AI-Powered Workflow Automation

  - [Marcel showcased examples of AI workflows developed for other clients:](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [Automated follow-up emails post-calls](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [Salesforce field enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Persona profile building based on multiple data sources](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Potential use cases for Merge:](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [Event follow-ups and nurture tracks](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [Custom nurture flows in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
      - [Re-engagement workflows for no-shows or closed-lost opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
      - [Integration with tools like Qualified for website visitor engagement](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO

  - [Merge currently has a content marketer but lacks strategic guidance](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [fwd.digital's approach:](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [Leveraging Merge's 200+ integrations for content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Using AI to generate content ideas, FAQs, and full articles](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [Producing 100,000 words per month with full-time editing support](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [Capability to handle technical content](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Potential to outperform Merge's current SEO vendor in terms of output and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Budget and Next Steps

  - [Merge's new budget becomes available January 1st](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Zena aims to finalize decisions within a week](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Marcel to provide:](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
    1.  Statement of Work (SOW) without content specifics
    2.  Quick content strategy overview
    3.  Mini content audit to demonstrate potential approach

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send SOW and content strategy overview to Zena](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting at upcoming breakfast event to finalize details](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=2075.0)
  - [Zena to review proposal and compare with current SEO vendor's offering](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Decision to be made on engagement scope (workflow automation vs. full service including content) within a week](https://fathom.video/share/EgEGTt29iip3sznADaGWbshsyax_1ucM?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
